message:
feat(conformance): expand tensor meta fixture cases and conformance lib

- Update tensor_meta_cases.json with refined fixture parameters
- Expand conformance lib (22 lines) with additional test scaffolding
  for tensor metadata validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
